title: ophrys × alejandrei
intro: Ophrys × alejandrei is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys lucis, which is also known as the Bee Ophrys or the Orchis bee. This plant contains bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, that have been found to exhibit potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ophrys × alejandrei are primarily linked to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
